hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; py -3 (Join-Path $root '.wishgraph/hooks/memory_sync.py') session-start --host codex"
powershell -NoProfile -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; py -3 (Join-Path $root '.wishgraph/hooks/memory_sync.py') user-prompt-submit --host codex"
powershell -NoProfile -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; py -3 (Join-Path $root '.wishgraph/hooks/memory_sync.py') pre-tool-use --host codex"
powershell -NoProfile -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; py -3 (Join-Path $root '.wishgraph/hooks/memory_sync.py') stop --host codex"
